payload.title: Capital Program Committee Meeting
payload.description: MTA Capital Program Committee meeting book for February 21, 2023 meeting, covering C&D capital program updates, station accessibility projects, safety report, commitments and completions, and procurements.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
entity.parent_entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent entities are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.project_name: ADA upgrade 149 St-Grand Concourse and Tremont Av
payload.description: ADA accessibility to 149 St-Grand Concourse complex (2, 4, 5) and Tremont Av (B, D) stations in the Bronx. Six new elevators, stairs, elevator machine rooms, ADA boarding areas, and restoration of historic headhouse at 149 St Station.

payload.project_name: Accessibility Upgrade at Eight Stations Package 1
payload.description: Design-build contract for ADA accessibility at New Dorp (SIR), Grand St (L), Beach 67 St (A), 7 Av (F, G), Dyckman St northbound only (1), East 149 St (6), Lorimer St (L), and Metropolitan Av (G) stations. 18 elevators (12 machine-room-less, 6 hydraulic), SoGR at New Dorp and Metropolitan Av.

payload.project_name: Accessibility Upgrade, Elevator Replacement, and Station Improvements at Eight (8) Stations Package 2
payload.description: Design-build contract for new ADA compliant elevators at six stations (8th Av/N, Westchester Sq/6, 181 St/A, Woodhaven Blvd/J/Z, Court Sq/G, Queensboro Plaza/N/W/7), elevator replacement at Marcy & Flushing Av (J/M/Z), and SoGR at Westchester Sq and Woodhaven Blvd. 16 elevators total (11 new, 5 replacement).

Design-build contract to provide ADA accessibility at 68th Street/Hunter College Station on Lexington Avenue Line (6) in Manhattan. Three new elevators, two new street-to-platform entrances, platform edge and stair reconstruction, new lighting, signage, SoGR work, CCTV and fire alarm systems.

Project to provide new MNR rail service to and from Penn Station, including four new ADA stations in the Bronx, 19 miles of new track, over 200 new catenary structures, 8 new power substations, rehabilitation/replacement of 4 bridges.

Rehabilitation of Cortlandt Street #1 Line Station at World Trade Center complex. Original contract awarded to Judlau Contracting, Inc. in April 2015. Station opened for revenue service September 8, 2018, substantial completion declared July 31, 2019.
MTA Independent Engineering Consultant
Design-Build contractor for ADA 149th St/Tremont Ave project
Design partner for ADA Package 1 with Judlau Contracting
Design-Builder joint venture of MLJ Contracting Corporation and TC Electric, LLC with AECOM USA, Inc. as Lead Designer
Elevator manufacturer with 15-year long-term elevator maintenance, repair, and inspection contracts
Design-Build contractor for ADA 68th Street/Hunter College project
MTA Capital Program Committee Meeting at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY, 12:45-2:00 PM ET
Combined Committee Meetings, 8:30 a.m. to 12 p.m., New York, New York. Minutes approved at February meeting.

tool_args.label: Leggett crossover delivered to Penn Station Access project site

payload.description: Key component for improving operational flexibility on Penn Station Access project -- procured, fabricated and delivered to project site, with installation set for 2023.
Recent opening of Grand Central Madison, a historic milestone bringing the project to fruition within the $11.4B budget and with minimal schedule impact.
Substantial completion declared on July 31, 2019. Station opened for revenue service on September 8, 2018.
